sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87290" key="proennoe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεν-νοέω</orth>, <sense id="n87290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conceive</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consider beforehand,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1072a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
